title: Raccoon Removal Upper West Side | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Licensed wildlife experts serving UWS homes & buildings. Safe, humane removal $900-$4,000. Call now!
intro: Raccoons in the Upper West Side are increasingly finding their way into residential buildings, brownstones, and historic properties between Central Park and Riverside Park. Our professional raccoon removal services protect Upper West Side homes and families from these intelligent animals that can cause significant structural damage and health risks. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane, and effective raccoon removal throughout the UWS neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Upper West Side residents for years with specialized knowledge of Manhattan's unique wildlife challenges. Our licensed technicians understand the architectural nuances of UWS brownstones, pre-war buildings, and townhouses, ensuring effective raccoon removal while preserving your property's integrity.
localContext: The Upper West Side's proximity to Central Park and Riverside Park, combined with its tree-lined streets and classic brownstone architecture, creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity. These masked bandits often exploit roof access, chimney openings, and basement entry points common in the neighborhood's pre-war and historic buildings stretching from Columbus Circle to 110th Street.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons so common in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: The Upper West Side's location between Central Park and Riverside Park provides raccoons with natural habitat corridors, abundant food sources, and easy access to residential buildings. The neighborhood's mature trees, accessible garbage areas, and older building infrastructure with potential entry points make it particularly attractive to raccoons seeking shelter and food.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in the Upper West Side typically ranges from $900 to $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, necessary repairs, and whether babies are present. Multi-story brownstones and buildings with attic or chimney infestations may require more extensive work, affecting the final price.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Upper West Side raccoon emergencies. We understand that raccoons can cause immediate damage and create health hazards, so our team prioritizes rapid response times throughout Manhattan. Once you call, we'll schedule an inspection and begin the removal process as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane and legal in NYC?
faqs.answer: Yes, our raccoon removal methods are completely humane and fully compliant with New York City and State wildlife regulations. We use live trapping techniques and follow all legal protocols for wildlife removal. Our approach prioritizes the safety of both the animals and your family, and we ensure raccoons are handled according to NYC Department of Health guidelines.
